title: Non-virtualized mapped list in ScrollView
message: Your users get slow scrolling when <ScrollView> with items.map(...) builds every row at once.
help: `<ScrollView>{items.map(...)}</ScrollView>` builds every row at once, which slows scrolling. Use FlashList, LegendList, or FlatList instead.
